subcodes.first_line: The morn hath dawned, and the moon hath shone forth, and the sun proclaimeth: "Unto Me, unto Me, O peoples of the earth! By God, there hath appeared that which hath never appeared before." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طلع الفجر و لاح القمر و الشمس تنادی الی الی یا ملا الارض تالله قد ظهر ما لا ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @belief and denial, @symbolism, @praise and encouragement
